title: Google Maps Scraper Results
description: Scraped Google Maps business listings with contact details and metadata

searchString.title: Search Query
searchString.description: The Google Maps search query that returned this listing

address.title: Address
address.description: Full street address of the business

website.title: Website URL
website.description: Business website URL with tracking parameters stripped

emails.title: Email Addresses
emails.description: Email addresses extracted from the business website

emailSource.title: Email Source Method
emailSource.description: Method used to extract the email (mailto, jsonld, html, cloudflare)

categoryName.title: Business Category
categoryName.description: Google Maps category (e.g. Plumber, Restaurant, Coffee Shop)

totalScore.title: Star Rating
totalScore.description: Average star rating on Google Maps (1.0–5.0)

openingHours.title: Opening Hours
openingHours.description: Array of opening hours by day

placeId.title: Google Place ID
placeId.description: Unique Google identifier for this place

url.title: Google Maps URL
url.description: URL to the business's Google Maps place page

scrapedAt.title: Scraped At
scrapedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the listing was scraped

_isNew.title: Is New Listing
_isNew.description: Whether this listing was seen for the first time (true) or was already known from a previous run (false). Only present when incremental mode is enabled.

_placeId.title: Place ID (Hash)
_placeId.description: Stable hash identifier for this place. Used by incremental mode to track previously seen listings.

_crmHeaders.title: CRM CSV Headers
_crmHeaders.description: CSV header line matching the selected CRM's import format.

_crmRow.title: CRM CSV Row
_crmRow.description: CSV values for this row formatted for the selected CRM import.
